creator: einar@isnic.is
text:
(In reply to Marius Schamschula from comment #0)

We had the same error, but with our own PHP code, not nextcloud.

For us it's enough to re-install php81-pecl-APCu.
We build our own packages in poudriere, but pkg update -f did not see any upgrades and restarting php-fpm did not fix the problem. We had to re-install the package and then restart php-fpm.

pkg install -f php81-pecl-APCu
service php-fpm restart
